opinion.h4: SEFERI ET AL. v. IVES, STATE HIGHWAY COMMISSIONER. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CONNECTICUT. No. 1241. Decided May 20, 1968.
opinion.p: Robert K. Killian, Attorney General of Connecticut, and Jack Rubin and Clement J. Kichuk, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: NORTH AMERICAN VAN LINES, INC. v. UNITED STATES, 391 U.S. 359 (1968)
opinion.p: 391 U.S. 359 NORTH AMERICAN VAN LINES, INC. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF INDIANA. No. 1295. Decided May 20, 1968.

Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert W. Ginnane, and Betty Jo Christian for the United States et al., and Alan F. Wohlstetter for Smyth Overseas Van Lines, Inc., et al., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
